Oxford City Council Housing Department
St Aldate's Chambers, Oxford, OX1 1DS

14 March 2026

Dear Tenant,

NOTICE TO QUIT — POSSESSION PROCEEDINGS

This letter serves as formal notice that Oxford City Council intends to seek possession of the property at 42 Cowley Road, Oxford, OX4 1HZ.

You are required to vacate the premises within 14 days of the date of this letter, by 28 March 2026. Failure to vacate by this date will result in the council making an application to Oxford County Court for a possession order.

The grounds for this notice are rent arrears totalling £1,847.00 as of the date of this letter.

If you believe this notice has been issued in error, or if you wish to discuss a repayment arrangement, you must contact this office immediately on 01865 249811.

You may be entitled to housing advice and support. Contact Oxford City Council Housing Advice on 01865 252848.

Yours sincerely,
J. Hartley
Housing Officer, Oxford City Council
